title: What to know about the weapon used in Trump assassination attempt
shortDescription: An AR-15 style rifle was used in the attempt to assassinate former President Trump. Here's what to know about the popular gun.

title: Here's when Trump is expected to speak at RNC
shortDescription: Donald Trump will attend the 2024 Republican National Convention, days after a gunman attempted to assassinate him.

title: Shooting shakes a Biden v. Trump election already shattering norms
shortDescription: With an assassination attempt, the word unprecedented seems inadequate to describe where we find ourselves four months before Election Day.

title: What we know: Ronny Jackson nephew injured at Trump rally shooting
shortDescription: The shooting killed one spectator, and seriously injured two others. The shooter, identified as 20-year-old Thomas Crooks, is dead.

title: What we know about Trump rally shooting victims: 1 dead, 2 injured
shortDescription: One person was killed and two were 'critically injured' in a shooting and assassination attempt at a Trump rally. Here's what we know on the victims.

title: Melania Trump condemns assassination attempt: 'Ascend above hate'
shortDescription: The former first lady said she realized her life was "on the brink of devastating change" after bullet grazed Donald Trump.

title: Security preps underway after Trump rally shooting
shortDescription: Following the shooting at a Trump rally in Pennsylvania, concerns have quickly shifted to security at the upcoming RNC in Wisconsin.

title: First video of Trump after assassination attempt
shortDescription: Donald Trump arrives in New Jersey after being rushed off stage during an assassination attempt during his Pennsylvania rally.

title: Timeline: Shooting at Trump rally
shortDescription: An alleged lone gunman opened fire at a rally for Donald Trump in Pennsylvania. The shooting is being investigated as an assassination attempt.

title: Who is Meredith O'Rourke, behind GoFundMe for Trump rally victims?
shortDescription: Meredith O'Rourke of Tallahassee, Trump's top finance person, is listed as the organizer of the online fundraiser.

title: Trump says 'God alone' spared him after brazen assassination attempt
shortDescription: Trump was injured in the right ear after a sniper opened fire Saturday at a Pennsylvania campaign rally.

title: President Biden responds to incident at Trump rally
shortDescription: Biden delivered brief remarks about the shooting that occurred at a Donald Trump campaign rally Saturday, saying, "We cannot allow for this to be happening."

title: Trump rally shooter Thomas Crooks: What we know
shortDescription: The FBI identified the shooter as a 20-year-old from Bethel Park, Pennsylvania. Public records show he was a registered Republican.

title: Thomas Matthew Crooks identified as Trump shooter at Pennsylvania rally
shortDescription: The man who shot former President Donald Trump at a Pennsylvania political rally has been identified.

title: Timeline of Trump rally shooting and assassination attempt
shortDescription: Here's a timeline of the events at former President Donald Trump's rally that ended with a shooting and assassination attempt in Butler, Pennsylvania.

title: Netanyahu, Orbán, Trudeau, Starmer, Boric react to Trump shooting
shortDescription: World leaders reacted with shock to news of the Trump assassination attempt at a rally Saturday in Butler, Pennsylvania.

title: OnPolitics: Assassination attempt on Trump
shortDescription: Former president is safe, gunman killed after shooting at rally in Pennsylvania.

title: FBI to lead investigation into Trump rally shooting
shortDescription: The shooting happened just days before the National Republican Convention is scheduled to kick off in Milwaukee.

title: Eyewitness video captures Donald Trump moments after shooting
shortDescription: Eyewitness video from Donald Trump's rally captures the secret service rushing the former president off the stage.

title: Republican National Convention still on after shooting at Trump rally
shortDescription: The RNC in Milwaukee will go on as scheduled, Donald Trump's campaign confirmed after a shooting that left the former president injured.

title: Republicans point fingers at Biden after Trump rally shooting
shortDescription: President Biden recently told donors he wanted to "put Trump in a bullseye." Now some Republicans are blaming him for Trump's shooting.

title: Democrats condemn violence after Trump assassination attempt
shortDescription: Top Democratic lawmakers are condemning political violence following a shooting and Trump assassination attempt at a rally Saturday.

title: 'Horrifying' shooting at Trump rally
shortDescription: Eyewitnesses shared the horrifying moment shots rang out at former President Donald Trump's rally in Pennsylvania.

title: 'I was shot with a bullet:' Donald Trump recounts shooting
shortDescription: "Much bleeding took place, so I realized then what was happening," Trump says in Truth Social post.
